name: Rigatoni with Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry Red Wine or Water
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 4
Over medium heat, cook sausage in a 10-quart skillet until browned, stirring to separate the meat. Remove the casing and spoon off the fat. Add minced garlic, spaghetti sauce, wine (or water), and sliced pepperoncini peppers. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add quartered olives, half of the grated cheese, and hot cooked rigatoni. Toss to coat well. Serve topped with remaining cheese.
